volunteer.title: Volunteer Developer
description: Contributed to an open-source project by fixing bugs and adding new features.
Collaborated with other developers on GitHub to review and merge pull requests.
Participated in community discussions and provided support to other contributors.

professional.title: Software Engineer
description: Developed and maintained web applications using React and Node.js.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to design and implement new features.
Optimized application performance and improved user experience.

professional.title: Software Engineer Intern
description: Assisted in the development of a new feature for the Facebook app.
Conducted code reviews and provided feedback to other team members.
Participated in daily stand-up meetings and sprint planning sessions.
